verdicts.reason: It identifies someone who does the same thing again after an earlier doing of it.

verdicts.missing: It requires many later repetitions, whereas repeating once is sufficient; it carries an over-narrow repeated-many-times subtype.
verdicts.reason: The same-action recurrence is present, but the added many-times condition wrongly narrows the sense.
It states that someone does one thing and does that same thing again later.
It entails that the person does the same thing before and again at the stated time, though redundantly.
It identifies someone who does the same thing again after an earlier doing of it.
